name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 10 Feb 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes updates from eCommerce releases "},{"text":"6.318.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.319.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.319.1","bold":true},{"text":" (Hotfix), "},{"text":"6.320.0, ","bold":true},{"text":"and "},{"text":"6.321.0","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENTS","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Triggering the Confirmation Email From AddOrder API","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now trigger the sending of the confirmation email from the AddOrder API. A new attribute - "},{"text":"SendConfirmationEmail","bold":true},{"text":" - has been added to the "},{"text":"AddOrder","bold":true},{"text":" API. The attribute accepts a boolean value - True or False."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about the API, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fdevelopers.maropost.com%2Fdocumentation%2Fengineers%2Fapi-documentation%2Forders-invoices%2Faddorder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"AddOrder API","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Purchasing Gift Vouchers Through Afterpay Disallowed","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Afterpay integration has been updated to disallow purchasing Gift Vouchers through Afterpay, in compliance with Afterpay’s Terms & Conditions."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"BUG FIXES","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which the users could not save an order with an empty “State” shipping address field, even though the ORDER_ALLOW_EMPTY_STATE config was enabled."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where customer statements were generated as blank PDF documents when no start date was selected in case of a large number of order records. This issue has been fixed now - the Start Date field now defaults to the 1st of the current month and can be manually adjusted."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which the Control Panel users who have a full stop in their username, and did not have the "},{"text":"See all customers","bold":true},{"text":" permission enabled, were not able to add an order."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where orderline SKUs added to orders through the API were case-sensitive, leading to the created order not being associated with the matching SKUs."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where, in some cases, the "},{"text":"Daily Receipts","bold":true},{"text":" widget in the Control Panel dashboard was causing a distorted Control Panel UI."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where, in some cases, users could not move the new Amazon orders to the Pick or Pack status."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which duplicate Purchase Orders were created if the user double-clicked on the Next button during PO creation."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a minor issue in the Discount creation flow, wherein if a Discount was edited, the "},{"text":"Last Edited","bold":true},{"text":" timestamp was shown in the UTC timezone instead of the store’s system timezone."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where, in some cases, the order ID and Orderline sort order were incorrect on the View Orders page."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
